name: PTG Energy Public Company Limited
summary: PTG Energy Public Company Limited trades in petroleum products, gas products, and supplies and equipment for oil service stations in Thailand. The company also trades in consumable products; and operates petrol stations. Its fuel products include diesel and gasoline. The company also trades in food and beverages; operates convenience stores under the Max Mart name; coffee shops under the Pun Thai Coffee and Coffee World, ice-cream shops under the Cream & Fudge name; restaurants under the Thai Chef express; and sandwich shop under the New York 5th Av. Deli name. In addition, it is involved in the production and trading of ethanol; transportation of fuel; manufacturing of biogas, and biomass power plants, and other types of power plants; provision of construction services; operation of tank farms and service stations; and car service center. Further, the company develops communication tools equipment; provides e-money services, electronic money transfer, payment facility, and bill payment services, as well as provides support services to the issuer or recipient of the electronic card or the seller of goods or services. The company was formerly known as Paktai Chueplerng Company Limited. PTG Energy Public Company Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
